category_sources: source_facts.description: Framework to smartly mirror git repositories.
source_facts.executables lists grok mirror management commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies the official mricon/grokmirror project.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is the mricon/grokmirror repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists grok-pull, grok-manifest, grok-fsck, and related CLI tools.
